name: Model S
desc: The ultimate electric sedan with breathtaking performance, long-range capabilities, and a spacious, high-tech interior.
imagePrompt: Cinematic product photography of a Tesla Model S in solid black, captured from a low-angle three-quarters view. The setting is a wet asphalt road at dusk, with reflections from neon city lights. Emphasize the car's sleek lines and aerodynamic profile.

name: Model 3
desc: The world's best-selling electric car. A perfect balance of performance, range, and affordability, designed for mass appeal.
imagePrompt: Clean, studio shot of a Tesla Model 3 in pearl white multi-coat against an infinity white background. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the car's minimalist design and clean surfaces. The car is angled slightly toward the camera.

name: Model X
desc: The safest, fastest, and most capable electric SUV. Featuring iconic Falcon Wing doors and seating for up to seven.
imagePrompt: Dynamic shot of a Tesla Model X in deep blue metallic with its Falcon Wing doors open. The setting is a scenic mountain pass during golden hour. The image should convey a sense of adventure, family, and luxury.

name: Model Y
desc: A versatile, all-electric, mid-size SUV that offers leading range, superior performance, and ample storage.
imagePrompt: Lifestyle photography of a Tesla Model Y in stealth grey parked in a modern, suburban driveway. A family is visible in the background, out of focus. The focus is on the car, suggesting its role in everyday modern life.

name: Cybertruck
desc: A radical departure from traditional trucks. Built with an exoskeleton of stainless steel and armored glass for superior durability and performance.
imagePrompt: High-impact, dramatic shot of the Tesla Cybertruck in a rugged, off-road desert environment at sunset. The stainless steel body should reflect the warm colors of the sky. The image should look tough, futuristic, and unbreakable.

name: Roadster
desc: The quickest car in the world, with record-setting acceleration, range, and performance. The ultimate supercar.
imagePrompt: Action shot of the next-generation Tesla Roadster in red, blurring through a tight corner on a professional race track. The photo should capture a strong sense of speed and extreme performance, with motion blur on the background and wheels.

imagePrompt: Clean, studio shot of a Tesla Model 3 in pearl white multi-coat against an infinity white background. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the car's minimalist design and clean surfaces. The car is angled slightly toward the camera.

name: Model X
desc: The safest, fastest, and most capable electric SUV. Featuring iconic Falcon Wing doors and seating for up to seven.
imagePrompt: Dynamic shot of a Tesla Model X in deep blue metallic with its Falcon Wing doors open. The setting is a scenic mountain pass during golden hour. The image should convey a sense of adventure, family, and luxury.

name: Model Y
desc: A versatile, all-electric, mid-size SUV that offers leading range, superior performance, and ample storage.
imagePrompt: Lifestyle photography of a Tesla Model Y in stealth grey parked in a modern, suburban driveway. A family is visible in the background, out of focus. The focus is on the car, suggesting its role in everyday modern life.

name: Cybertruck
desc: A radical departure from traditional trucks. Built with an exoskeleton of stainless steel and armored glass for superior durability and performance.
imagePrompt: High-impact, dramatic shot of the Tesla Cybertruck in a rugged, off-road desert environment at sunset. The stainless steel body should reflect the warm colors of the sky. The image should look tough, futuristic, and unbreakable.

name: Roadster
desc: The quickest car in the world, with record-setting acceleration, range, and performance. The ultimate supercar.
imagePrompt: Action shot of the next-generation Tesla Roadster in red, blurring through a tight corner on a professional race track. The photo should capture a strong sense of speed and extreme performance, with motion blur on the background and wheels.

name: Model S
desc: The ultimate electric sedan with breathtaking performance, long-range capabilities, and a spacious, high-tech interior.
imagePrompt: Cinematic product photography of a Tesla Model S in solid black, captured from a low-angle three-quarters view. The setting is a wet asphalt road at dusk, with reflections from neon city lights. Emphasize the car's sleek lines and aerodynamic profile.

name: Midnight Eclipse Espresso
desc: A bold and intense dark roast blend with notes of dark chocolate, toasted walnut, and a hint of smokiness. Perfect for a powerful start.
imagePrompt: Macro shot of a freshly pulled espresso shot in a dark ceramic cup, with a thick, rich crema on top. Dark, moody lighting with strong contrast.

name: Golden Hour Latte
desc: A perfectly balanced and creamy latte made with our signature espresso and velvety steamed milk. Smooth, comforting, and utterly satisfying.
imagePrompt: A latte in a clear glass mug, showing the layers of espresso and milk, with delicate latte art on top. Set against a warm, softly lit background.

name: Forest Whisper Cold Brew
desc: A slow-steeped cold brew infused with a hint of chicory and spice. Exceptionally smooth with a clean, refreshing finish and a touch of mystery.
imagePrompt: Abstract 3D geometric shape representing Forest Whisper Cold Brew, elegant minimalist product design, white background

name: Sunstone Single-Origin
desc: A vibrant single-origin coffee from the Ethiopian highlands, boasting bright, fruity notes of blueberry, citrus, and jasmine. A truly exquisite pour-over experience.
imagePrompt: Abstract 3D geometric shape representing Sunstone Single-Origin, elegant minimalist product design, white background

name: Alchemist's Pour-Over
desc: Our signature manual brew, expertly crafted by our baristas to bring out the nuanced flavors of the chosen bean. A pure and aromatic cup.
imagePrompt: A barista's hands in motion, pouring hot water from a gooseneck kettle over a Kalita Wave dripper. The focus is on the precision of the pour.

name: Mystic Mocha
desc: A decadent and rich mocha made with premium Belgian chocolate, our bold espresso, and topped with a dusting of cocoa powder. A luxurious treat.
imagePrompt: A large mug of mocha topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of chocolate sauce. The setting is cozy, perhaps with a book in the background.
